commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Updates the `plugins/lossless-claw` submodule from `88eb291` to `d404eba`, the upstream Lossless Claw v0.13.0 release commit.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blocker: source inspection shows tracked reports still point at old line refs and package metadata while the proposed submodule points at v0.13.0. No end-user runtime reproduction is applicable for this dependency bump.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Queue a narrow repair to regenerate the Lossless fixture outputs and smoke the updated source/package surfaces; no product decision is needed.

target.title: chore(deps): bump plugins/lossless-claw from `88eb291` to `d404eba`
target.body:
Bumps [plugins/lossless-claw](https://github.com/Martian-Engineering/lossless-claw) from `88eb291` to `d404eba`.
Commits
  • d404eba chore: version packages (#834)
  • 9f36aa3 fix(reconcile): recover non-anchoring-frontier conversations past the no-anch...
  • 974c850 fix: preserve transcript timestamps during recovery imports
  • e6568d7 fix(engine): fail closed when the afterTurn transcript reconcile throws
  • 69ef486 docs: add changeset for summarizer retry headroom (#891)
  • 6c43c8e fix(gateway): use leafTargetTokens as maxTokens on summarizer retry for high-...
  • 264f63a Add configurable context threshold overrides
  • 77736e8 refactor: dedupe reconciler internals and decompose the after-turn orchestrat...
  • cdfcd97 test: cleanup round 2 — formatSessionLabel, typed test seams, suite splits, f...
  • 615454c refactor: extract TranscriptReconciler behind an explicit ReconcileHost (#872)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
target.author: app/dependabot

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
